nasb.text: “Take the waistband that you have bought, which is around your waist, and arise, go to the Euphrates and hide it there in a crevice of the rock.”

esv.text: “Take the loincloth that you have bought, which is around your waist, and arise, go to the Euphrates and hide it there in a cleft of the rock.”

cnv.text: “拿你買來束在腰上的腰帶，起來，往幼發拉底河去，把腰帶藏在那裡的巖石縫中。”

ccb.text: “拿着你买来的腰带去幼发拉底河边，把它藏在那里的石缝中。”
